notes: Has two main meanings: 1) a small family-run hotel or guesthouse, 2) retirement/pension (the payment received after retiring). The retirement meaning is often used in the phrase 'in Rente/Pension gehen'.

sentences.german: Wir haben letzte Woche in einer kleinen Pension am See übernachtet.
sentences.english: Last week we stayed overnight in a small guesthouse by the lake.

sentences.german: Nach 40 Jahren Arbeit geht sie nächsten Monat in Pension.
sentences.english: After 40 years of work, she is retiring next month.
